selfDisableLogic: Both crons check pipeline-state.json at start. If status=complete → disable self via cron tool → notify Discord. They stop automatically when pipeline is done.
reEnableOnNewPipeline: When starting a new pipeline, Morpheus MUST re-enable BOTH crons: cron(update, guardianCronJobId, {enabled:true}) AND cron(update, pipelineMonitorCronJobId, {enabled:true})
